name: VectraCore
tagline: Pure Java vector-search engine implementing HNSW and KD-Tree indexing.
description: Handled concurrent vector searches using synchronized indexing and thread pools. Reduced runtime overhead using a lightweight executable with Java's multithreaded HTTP server.

name: GrabPic
tagline: Real-time scalable photo sharing with AI retrieval.
description: Handled 2500+ real-time searches using scalable Spring Boot services. Reduced REST API latency to <200ms using Redis caching and secured workflows using Azure SAS URLs.

name: Offline Mesh Payments
tagline: Resilient offline payment workflows using encrypted multi-hop routing.
description: Built deferred settlement systems eliminating duplicate settlements using Redis SETNX and SHA-256. Secured wallet transactions using optimistic locking and AES-GCM encryption.
